summary: Iteration 26: Testing 4 Features in Prosthodontics App - Step Wizard, Loading Type Styling, Implant Planning on Detail Page, and Implant Selection Tab. Frontend-only testing as requested.

ui_bugs.issue: Step indicator (wizard dots and 'Step 1: Case Details & Pre-Surgical Protocol' text) is NOT rendering on the New Case page. The code at lines 337-344 defines the step indicator with data-testid='wizard-step-indicator' but HTML analysis shows hasStep1InHTML: False and hasStepIndicatorTestId: False. The step indicator is completely missing from rendered output.

The outer loadingTypeContainer has borderWidth: 1 in style definition (line 808) but renders with borderWidth: 0px. The individual chips have correct borders but the outer container border is not visible. This may be a React Native Web rendering issue.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Step Indicator not rendering - The wizard step dots and 'Step 1: Case Details & Pre-Surgical Protocol' text are not appearing on the New Case page despite being in the code. Need to investigate why this component is not rendering.
MEDIUM: Fix loadingTypeContainer outer border - The borderWidth: 1 style is not rendering. May need to use alternative CSS like 'borderStyle: solid' or convert to web-compatible style.
critical_code_review_comments: Step indicator code exists at lines 337-344 but is not rendering in the browser. The View with data-testid='wizard-step-indicator' and the Text with stepLabel are present in JSX but NOT appearing in DOM output.
The loadingTypeContainer style at line 808 has borderWidth: 1 but this is not being applied by React Native Web. Individual chips have proper borders (1px solid #DDD).
Feature 3 (Implant Planning on Detail Page) works correctly - CaseImplantPlanning component is visible with blue banner for pending_phase1 procedures.
Feature 4 (Implant Selection Tab) works correctly - FDI dental chart, implant system dropdown, and bone measurements all visible.

success_rate.frontend: 50% - 2 of 4 features pass (Feature 3 and 4 work, Feature 1 and 2 have issues)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature 1 (Step Wizard) and Feature 2 (Loading Type Container outer border) need fixes. Feature 3 (Implant Planning on procedure detail page with blue banner) and Feature 4 (Implant Selection standalone tab) are working correctly. Procedure ID 699fc5c1248100e8a0d87261 has status pending_phase1 and can be used for testing.

feature_1_step_wizard.description: Step indicator dots and 'Step 1: Case Details & Pre-Surgical Protocol' text NOT visible on New Case page
feature_1_step_wizard.evidence: HTML analysis shows hasStep1InHTML: False, hasStepIndicatorTestId: False
feature_1_step_wizard.expected: Two step dots connected by line, with text showing 'Step 1: Case Details & Pre-Surgical Protocol'
feature_1_step_wizard.actual: Page shows 'New Procedure' title directly after BackToDashboard component, no step indicator visible

feature_2_loading_type_styling.description: Individual chips have proper borders but outer container border not rendering

evidence.chips: border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221), borderRadius: 10px, bg: rgb(250, 250, 250)

feature_2_loading_type_styling.expected: Outer container with borderWidth: 1, borderColor: #DDD, borderRadius: 10, backgroundColor: #FAFAFA
feature_2_loading_type_styling.actual: Chips properly styled but container border not visible

feature_3_implant_planning_detail_page.description: CaseImplantPlanning visible on procedure detail page for pending_phase1 with blue banner
feature_3_implant_planning_detail_page.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Phase 1 Required: Complete Implant Planning Below' banner and Implant Planning component with FDI chart
feature_3_implant_planning_detail_page.expected: Blue banner and CaseImplantPlanning component visible for pending_phase1 procedures
feature_3_implant_planning_detail_page.actual: MATCHES expected - Banner text visible, Implant Planning section with existing implant (Neodent GM Helix) shown

feature_4_implant_selection_tab.description: Standalone Implant Selection tab works correctly
feature_4_implant_selection_tab.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Implant Selection' title, 'Let Me Choose' and 'Suggest Me' tabs, FDI dental chart, system dropdown (45 systems), bone measurement inputs
feature_4_implant_selection_tab.expected: Implant Selection tab accessible with full functionality
feature_4_implant_selection_tab.actual: MATCHES expected - All implant selection features working
